#[derive(Default)]
struct EmailAddress(String);

impl EmailAddress {
    fn new(s: String) -> Self {
        Self(s)
    }
}

#[derive(Default)]
struct Port(u16);

#[derive(Default)]
struct Username(String);

fn make_config() -> Config {
    Config::default()
}

struct Config {
    email: EmailAddress,
    port: Port,
    username: Username,
}

impl Default for Config {
    fn default() -> Self {
        Self {
            email: EmailAddress::default(),
            port: Port::default(),
            username: Username::default(),
        }
    }
}
